description: Common bloatware on ASUS ZenFone devices (ZenUI)

packages.name: ZenUI Launcher
packages.description: ASUS default launcher. Substitute: Nova Launcher.

packages.name: ASUS File Manager
packages.description: ASUS file manager. Substitute: Solid Explorer.

packages.name: ASUS Gallery
packages.description: ASUS photo gallery. Substitute: Google Photos.

packages.name: ASUS Flashlight
packages.description: ASUS flashlight app. Already built into quick settings.

packages.name: ASUS Easy Mode
packages.description: Simplified UI mode for new users.

packages.name: ASUS User Feedback
packages.description: Sends usage data to ASUS. Recommended to remove.

packages.name: Game Genie (ASUS)
packages.description: ASUS gaming overlay and optimizer. ROG Phone feature.

packages.name: ASUS System Update
packages.description: OTA update service. Removing disables system updates.

packages.name: Splendid (Display Manager)
packages.description: ASUS display color management. Removal may affect screen calibration.
